name: USER_PREFERENCES
description: The user-filled answer of 'What personal preferences should Claude consider in responses?' in Claude Profile settings.

name: APP_NAME
description: The name of the connected MCP app.

name: APP_URL
description: The URL of the connected MCP app.

name: FULL_NAME
description: The full name set by the user in the General tab in the Settings.

name: NICKNAME
description: The input given by the user to the 'What should Claude call you?' field in the General tab in the Settings.

name: USER_PREFERENCES_SUMMARIZED
description: The input given by the user to the 'Instructions for Claude' field in the General tab in the Settings. Summarized by Claude.
